name: sdd-ship
description: Implement approved SDD tasks through the quality gate to Done — the second of the two-command workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Implement and verify approved SDD tasks
interface.longDescription: Orchestrate approved tasks through implement-tasks → quality-gate (or lite-gate) → workflow-retrospective. Auto-detects lite vs full track from AGENTS.md. Supports zero-argument context-aware invocation. The second of the two-command SDD workflow — use after sdd-bootstrap.
capabilities: Batch implementation of approved tasks in dependency order
Automatic lite/full track detection from AGENTS.md spec_profile
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the ship skill for specs/<feature>/tasks.md
